message.content:
Explore the codebase at /Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/recommendations-service to understand:

1. In src/modules/opensearch/opensearch.service.ts — find all conversation memory methods (createConversation, addConversationInteraction, getConversationInteractions, predictModel) and their exact signatures
2. In src/modules/opensearch/opensearch-conversational.service.ts — find the searchProducts method, specifically how it currently handles memoryId and llmQuestion params and the RAG response parsing
3. Check if there's any existing conversation state management or session handling
4. Look at how the OpenSearch module is configured (opensearch.module.ts)
5. Check the bootstrap command for what models are registered (bootstrap-conversational-search.command.ts)

Return exact method signatures, types, and module configurations.

content.text: I'll systematically explore the OpenSearch module to understand the conversation memory methods, RAG response handling, and module configuration.
